recommendations.title: All the Bright Places
recommendations.overview: Two teens facing personal struggles form a powerful bond as they embark on a cathartic journey chronicling the wonders of Indiana.

recommendations.title: All Together Now
recommendations.overview: An optimistic, talented teen clings to a huge secret: she's homeless and living on a school bus. When tragedy strikes, can she learn to accept a helping hand?

recommendations.title: Replicas
recommendations.overview: A scientist becomes obsessed with returning his family to normalcy after a terrible accident.

recommendations.title: People We Meet on Vacation
recommendations.overview: Poppy's a free spirit. Alex loves a plan. After years of summer vacations, these polar-opposite pals wonder if they could be a perfect romantic match.

recommendations.title: Mystic River
recommendations.overview: The lives of three men who were childhood friends are shattered when one of them suffers a family tragedy.
